Email Google Scholar GitHub LinkedIn Lab

Hyung-Seok Oh

I am an integrated M.S. & Ph.D. student in the Department of Artificial Intelligence at Korea University. My research centers on speech generation and affective speech modeling, with particular interests in speech synthesis, neural vocoders, voice conversion, generative models, and affective computing.

  • Speech synthesis
  • Affective speech
  • Voice conversion
  • Generative models
  • Expressive TTS
Education & Experience News Publications Projects Awards Patents Services

NAVER Cloud, Seongnam, South Korea
